question_intent: What is the full name of the conference in which the team with the most goals scored in the 2009 season played?

plan.question_intent: What is the full name of the conference in which the team with the most goals scored in the 2009 season played?
plan.detail_query: SELECT t1.year, t1.tmid, t1.name, t1.confid, t1.gf, a.fullname FROM teams AS t1 JOIN (SELECT t2.year, t2.tmid, MAX(t2.gf) AS max_gf FROM teams AS t2 WHERE t2.year = 2009 GROUP BY t2.year) AS t3 ON t1.year = t3.year AND t1.tmid = t3.tmid AND t1.gf = t3.max_gf JOIN abbrev AS a ON t1.confid = a.code WHERE t1.year = 2009

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM teams AS t2
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM teams AS t2
WHERE (t2.year = 2009)
LIMIT 5

SELECT t2.year, t2.tmid, MAX(t2.gf) AS max_gf
FROM teams AS t2
WHERE (t2.year = 2009)
GROUP BY t2.year

build_logs.notes: This block returns the full name of the conference in which the team with the most goals scored in the 2009 season played

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM teams AS t1 JOIN (SELECT t2.year, t2.tmid, MAX(t2.gf) AS max_gf
FROM teams AS t2
WHERE (t2.year = 2009)
GROUP BY t2.year) AS t3 ON t1.year = t3.year AND t1.tmid = t3.tmid AND t1.gf = t3.max_gf JOIN abbrev AS a ON t1.confid = a.code
LIMIT 5

SELECT a.fullname
FROM teams AS t1 JOIN (SELECT t2.year, t2.tmid, MAX(t2.gf) AS max_gf
FROM teams AS t2
WHERE (t2.year = 2009)
GROUP BY t2.year) AS t3 ON t1.year = t3.year AND t1.tmid = t3.tmid AND t1.gf = t3.max_gf JOIN abbrev AS a ON t1.confid = a.code

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.ga_per_game) AS avg_ga_per_game
FROM (SELECT g.playerid, g.year, g.ga, g.gp, CAST(g.ga AS REAL) / CAST(g.gp AS REAL) AS ga_per_game
FROM goalies g
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference')) AS leaf_1

question: What is the full name of the team(s) that scored the highest number of goals in 2009, for each conference?
